titleStmt.title: SII 23.49: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 49. (A.R. No. 49 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This is an inscription of the 5th year of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷadēva (II?), recording an endowment of three plots of land after purchase at Ediriliśōḻamaṅgalam a dēvadāna village to (the temple of) Tiruviśalūr-Uḍaiyār, by a lady by name Śiriyāṇḍāḷ Sāni the wife of one Kurōvi Ātkoṇḍān-Bhaṭṭan, for the maintenance of a perpetual lamp in the temple with the produce thereof after paying the taxes due on the lands. Edirilichōḷa and Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara are known to have been the titles of king Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastī śrī . virutarājabhayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu Uṭai yār tiruvicalūr ruṭaiyāṟkku Etiri
licoḻa[catu]rvetimaṅkalattu śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yaā ṇṭu Añcāvatu kurovi Āṭkoṇ
ṭāṉ paṭṭaṉ brāhmaṇi ciṟiyāṇṭāḷ cāṉi Ittevar tevatāṉam Etirilicoḻamaṅkalattu vi
rutarājapayaṅkaravatikku kiḻakku śrītevinārāyattukku teṟkku 4 kūṟṟu 3- ñ catirattu nilam 3�5 10 3
teṉkūṟṟu 3- ñcatirattu nilam 2�4ṛ Āka nilam varu� paḻampaṭi nilam kāle Arai māvum Ittevar
kku nellukku nellum Antarāyamum Ūrmāvintapaṭi Iṟuttu Itil Iṟaimikiti Uḷḷutu Ittevar
kku tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Uṭalāka koḷkaikku Iṉṉilam kāṇi Āḷar pakkale Ivar kāṇiyāka koṇṭu viṭṭamaikku paṉmāye śvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
